project_type: Python cognitive agent prototype with concept formation, eval system, memory OS, theory runtime
build_system: setuptools with pyproject.toml, no external deps beyond pytest
test_framework: pytest, tests in tests/ directory, one file per feature area
verification_instructions: Run pytest with all tests passing (163 existing + new tests)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network, Python 3.12.13 via pyenv, pure Python no external deps
contribution_requirements: All documentation in Arabic using Legitimate Theft template. Existing thefts go up to 5.44, new ones start at 5.45. Features gated behind bool parameters in pipeline.
key_patterns: Dataclass objects in virtual_sia/core/objects/ with BaseObject parent, make_id(), .to_dict(), .create() classmethod
Eval runners in virtual_sia/eval/runners/ using compare_conditions pattern
Reports in virtual_sia/eval/reports/ as pure functions returning dicts
Memory store is InMemoryMemoryStore with store_memory/get/all methods
Tests follow pattern: test_<feature>.py with descriptive test functions
Legitimate Theft template: section X.XX, ما الذي أخذناه؟, ما الذي لم نأخذه الآن؟, ماذا أصبح عندنا؟
directory_structure: virtual_sia/core/objects/ (data models), virtual_sia/eval/ (evaluation: runners/, reports/, task_sets/, perturbations/, results/), virtual_sia/runtime/ (pipeline, memory_os, anomaly_runtime, concept_engine, contradiction_runtime, economy_control, reasoning_runtime, task_ingress, theory_runtime, verification_runtime)
